Control.Title: DataGrid
Control.Description: A full-featured grid control is available, complete with advanced features such as sorting, filtering, and selection.

Sample.Title: Data Binding
Sample.SearchTags: collection type, data binding, datatable, observable collection

Sample.Title: Sorting
Sample.SearchTags: sort, order, ascending, descending, arrange, sort order

Sample.Title: Custom Sorting
Sample.SearchTags: sort, order, custom sort, ascending, descending, arrange
Sample.Description: This sample illustrates custom sorting in a DataGrid. The name column is sorted according to the length of a cell value.

Sample.Title: Custom Grouping
Sample.Description: This sample showcases the custom grouping capabilities in SfDataGrid. Implement custom grouping logic if the standard grouping techniques do not meet your requirements. The sample below is grouped based on the total amount of sales in two quarters

Sample.Title: Filtering
Sample.SearchTags: filter, search, custom filter, find
Sample.Description: This sample demonstrates how to filter data programmatically in a DataGrid.

Sample.Title: Paging
Sample.WhatsNew: This feature allows users to manipulate data using the DataPager to view rows on multiple pages.

Sample.Title: Editing
Sample.SearchTags: editing, edit

Sample.Title: Dialog Editing
Sample.SearchTags: editing, edit

Sample.Title: Undo/Redo Edits
Sample.SearchTags: editing, edit, undoredo, undo, redo
Sample.WhatsNew: This feature allows users to undo and redo edited values. Undo can be performed using Ctrl + Z, and redo can be performed using Ctrl + Y.
Sample.Description: Undo and redo actions can be performed on edited values in the DataGrid. These actions can be executed using keyboard shortcuts such as Ctrl+Z for undo and Ctrl+Y for redo, allowing users to easily revert or reapply changes.

Sample.Title: Stacked Header
Sample.SearchTags: header, stacked, stacked header, stackedheaderow, stackedheader,merged column, merged header, grouped header, header grouped, column grouped

Sample.Title: Row Height
Sample.SearchTags: height, auto fit, query row height, auto row height, row height customization

Sample.Title: Unbound Views
Sample.SearchTags: Unbound columns

Sample.Title: Column Types
Sample.SearchTags: columns, column types, types of columns, grid columns, switch column,image column

Sample.Title: Cell Template
Sample.SearchTags: template, template column, cell customize, templating
Sample.Description: This sample demonstrates how to load a custom view into a column.

Sample.Title: Column Sizing
Sample.SearchTags: columns, column types, types of columns, grid columns, switch column,image column

Sample.Title: Column Chooser
Sample.SearchTags: column chooser, columns

Sample.Title: Cell Merge
Sample.SearchTags: cell, merge, merge cell, merge

Sample.Title: Auto Cell Merge
Sample.SearchTags: cell, merge, merge cell, auto, auto merge

Sample.Title: Custom Validation
Sample.WhatsNew: Cell Validation: Discount field should not exceed 40 percent. Row Validation: Sum of Expense and Freight should be a minimum of 3000 to be eligible for Discount.

Sample.Title: Selection
Sample.SearchTags: select, single select, multi select, row selection

Sample.Title: Real Time Update
Sample.SearchTags: dynamic, dynamic loading, real time update, dynamic updates, rendering dynamic data

Sample.Title: Styling
Sample.SearchTags: style, theme, conditional style, appearance, visualization

Sample.Title: Freeze Panes
Sample.SearchTags: freeze rows, freeze columns, sticky rows, sticky columns, fixed rows, fixed columns
Sample.Description: This sample demonstrates how to freeze rows and columns in a DataGrid.

Sample.Title: Clipboard Operation
Sample.Description: Clipboard operations can be performed on mobile platforms by long-pressing and selecting options from the pop-up menu, while on desktop platforms, they can be executed using keyboard shortcuts such as Ctrl+C (copy), Ctrl+X (cut), and Ctrl+V (paste).

Sample.Title: Drag And Drop
Sample.SearchTags: column dragging, column drag and drop, column reordering, row dragging, row drag and drop, row reordering
Sample.Description: Columns can be rearranged by tapping and dragging a column header, and rows can be rearranged by long pressing and dragging a row.
Sample.WhatsNew: Introduced a new support to reorder rows by dragging and dropping the respective rows like columns.

Sample.SearchTags: Load More
Sample.Title: Load More
Resizing
Sample.WhatsNew: This feature allows users to resize columns by tapping and dragging the right border of the column headers, and to resize rows by long-pressing the bottom border of the row header.
Sample.Description: Column and row resizing can be performed interactively in the DataGrid. Columns can be resized by tapping and dragging the right border of the column headers, while rows can be resized by long-pressing and dragging the bottom border of the row header.

Sample.Title: Printing
Sample.WhatsNew: This feature allows users to print the DataGrid directly from the application, providing a convenient way to generate hard copies of the data displayed in the grid.

Control.Title: Paging
Control.Description: A versatile pagination control that enables efficient navigation and management of large datasets by integrating seamlessly with data-bound controls like SfDataGrid, SfListView, and CollectionView.
